findings.description: Compliance is uniformly 1.0 with zero violations across all personas and runs, including combative and evasive ones where violations are likely. This indicates the compliance checker has blind spots.
findings.correction_applied: Add persona-specific compliance probes and violation detection rules that trigger on evasive or combative responses.

findings.description: Combative and evasive personas receive high continuity/tone scores despite near-zero resolution, inflating composites relative to cooperative runs; scoring weights appear unadjusted for persona difficulty.
findings.correction_applied: Introduce persona difficulty multipliers or separate normalization per borrower type.

findings.description: Composite never applies penalties because violations array is always empty; formula cannot penalize compliance issues even if they existed.
findings.correction_applied: Make compliance a hard constraint or apply an explicit penalty term regardless of violation list population.
